zone_entry.test_zone.speaker: Narrator
zone_entry.test_zone.text: Welcome to the world of NyWarudo.

zone_entry.test_zone_2.speaker: Narrator
zone_entry.test_zone_2.text: The air here grows heavy and cold.

zone_entry.test_zone_2.speaker: Mysterious Voice
zone_entry.test_zone_2.text: Who dares trespass in the Eastern Ruins?

zone_entries.beginner_forest.speaker: Narrator
zone_entries.beginner_forest.text:
Welcome in the world of NyWarudo.
This is a test version and a test map, so please expect inconsistencies.

zone_entries.beginner_forest.speaker: Narrator
zone_entries.beginner_forest.text:
Your current objective is to get out of the forest. 
Be warned that the way there shall not go without hurdles.

zone_entries.beginner_forest.speaker: SYSTEM NOTICE
zone_entries.beginner_forest.text:
You can move using the arrow keys, or the usual direction keys (wasd).
Try to proceed forward.
